name: CyberPower PFC Sinewave CP700PFCRM1U 700VA Rack-mountable UPS - 1U Rack-mountable - AVR - 8 Hour Recharge - 1.50 Minute Stand-by - 120 V AC Input - 120 V AC Output - Sine Wave - Serial Port - USB
